name: Ring of Essentia
description: This ring grants the wearer additional essentia that can be invested.

name: Amulet of Incarnum Shielding
description: This amulet protects against incarnum-based attacks and effects.

name: Cloak of Soulbound Resistance
description: This cloak grants resistance bonuses that scale with invested essentia.

name: Essentia Jewel
description: This jewel stores essentia that can be drawn upon when needed.

name: Incarnum Focus
description: This item enhances your ability to shape and bind soulmelds.

name: Soulbound Weapon
description: This weapon can have essentia invested into it for enhanced power.

name: Soulbound Armor
description: This armor can have essentia invested into it for enhanced protection.
